title: Bolusiella zenkeri
taxonomy: Bolusiella zenkeri is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It belongs to the genus Bolusiella, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The genus Bolusiella is part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Within the family Orchidaceae, Bolusiella zenkeri is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae includes a large group of terrestrial orchids found in tropical regions.
